diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reduced libido is a cardinal symptom of androgen deficiency.
Loss of interest including sexual interest also occurs in depression — non-specific in isolation.
Loss of nocturnal/early-morning erections points to an organic (including hormonal) contribution rather than purely psychogenic ED.
Low energy is common in androgen deficiency but highly non-specific.
Fatigue is a shared non-specific feature; needs thyroid function to assess.

symptoms.symptom_name: Subjective loss of muscle mass and physical strength

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Testosterone maintains lean muscle mass; a decline supports androgen deficiency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Reduced facial-hair growth / decreased shaving frequency

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reduced secondary sexual hair reflects chronic androgen deficiency and helps separate it from depression.

symptoms.symptom_name: Low mood, irritability and acute emotional breakdown

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Directly supports a depressive syndrome that must be assessed and safety-netted.
Depressed mood is a recognised somatic consequence of hypogonadism.

symptoms.symptom_name: Denies current suicidal ideation / self-harm thoughts / feeling unsafe

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute psychiatric emergency requiring immediate crisis response
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A negative direct SI screen lowers immediate crisis risk but does not remove the need for a mental-health safety-net; it can change with mood.

symptoms.symptom_name: No cold intolerance, coarse hair, snoring or daytime somnolence

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of classic hypothyroid features lowers its probability.
No snoring or daytime somnolence lowers OSA probability.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral small, soft testes on palpation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Small soft testes are a strong physical marker of hypogonadism — clinician exam finding, NOT obtainable via telehealth chat.
A raised oestrogen:androgen ratio produces gynaecomastia — supports the diagnosis; clinician exam finding, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Low fasting morning serum total testosterone on two separate occasions

investigation_details.expected_result: Consistently low on two separate morning fasting samples
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Without confirmatory bloods the diagnosis cannot be made and testosterone should not be started.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Two low morning fasting testosterone results are required to confirm the diagnosis — never available in real time via telehealth.

loinc_ref.display: Luteinizing hormone [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma

investigation_details.expected_result: Classifies primary vs secondary hypogonadism; low/normal gonadotropins prompt prolactin and pituitary work-up

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Secondary (hypogonadotropic) hypogonadism from a pituitary lesion / hyperprolactinaemia
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Gonadotropin level determines the cause and whether a pituitary work-up is needed — sealed clinician investigation.
Normal, stable vitals argue strongly against the acute life-threatening crisis implied by the note's framing — clinician-measured, sealed.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Low libido + lost morning erections + reduced muscle bulk + reduced secondary hair + small soft testes + gynaecomastia together are far more specific for androgen deficiency than any single feature, and separate it from primary depression.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Fasting morning total testosterone (two separate occasions), with SHBG
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First-line confirmatory test; must be a morning fasting sample and repeated before diagnosis.
Classifies primary vs secondary hypogonadism and screens for hyperprolactinaemia / pituitary cause.
Excludes hypothyroidism as a contributor to fatigue and low mood.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Testosterone replacement therapy prescription without confirmatory bloods
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: TRT must never be started before two confirmatory morning tests and cause classification — an error of commission.
